paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, with a decrease of 0.08% from the prior close and a decrease of 32.61% over the last 20 sessions.

There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but recent news includes the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer and the setup of an Interim Office of the CEO, as well as the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns. Retail traders have remained bullish on the stock despite the sharp selloff.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
